_notice: Remaining carbon budgets from 2025, adjusted from IPCC AR6 WG1 Table SPM.2 (originally expressed from 2020) to account for 2020-2024 cumulative emissions (~200 Gt CO2). Values are provisional — refer to the latest IPCC synthesis for publication.

options.name: IPCC AR6 — 1.5°C, 50th percentile
options.source: IPCC AR6 WG1 Table SPM.2 (500 Gt from 2020, −200 Gt 2020-2024)

options.name: IPCC AR6 — 1.5°C, 67th percentile
options.source: IPCC AR6 WG1 Table SPM.2 (400 Gt from 2020, −200 Gt 2020-2024)

options.name: IPCC AR6 — 2.0°C, 50th percentile
options.source: IPCC AR6 WG1 Table SPM.2 (1150 Gt from 2020, −200 Gt 2020-2024, rounded)

options.name: IPCC AR6 — 2.0°C, 67th percentile
options.source: IPCC AR6 WG1 Table SPM.2 (800 Gt from 2020, −200 Gt 2020-2024, rounded)
